title: [PyCDE] liveOperations.count(operation.ptr) == 0 && "cannot create detached operation that already exists"
body:
Observed in the Windows Py3.9 Release with asserts build job. Non-deterministic as retrying the build didn't fail. Commit f2340e5710df916342ab7167ea358b4ef749c73a.


This is unfortunately the exact same signature of the old Python/C++ Operation pointer sync issue. I thought we had this figured out but apparently not, @mikeurbach . Unsure if the behavioral test failing or not is a red herring. I'm doing some pretty funky stuff with stack frames, so its probably not.
